logs.m: $ ffprobe -v quiet -print_format json -show_streams Undegradable Bitch- to publish.wav
$ ffmpeg -i Undegradable Bitch- to publish.wav -vn -ar 48000 -sample_fmt s16 -ac 2 Undegradable Bitch- to publish_48k.wav

stages.name: Track Cutting
stages.description: Manual cut points or silence detection

logs.m: ⊘ Track cutting skipped — using full audio

stages.name: Stem Separation
stages.description: Demucs v4 · 6 stems

logs.m: $ demucs --model htdemucs_6s Undegradable Bitch- to publish_48k.wav

stages.name: 5.1 Channel Assignment & Spatial Upmix
stages.description: Stem routing · pan law · LFE crossover

logs.m: bass   → LFE (111 Hz LP) gain 1.48x, L/R residual 0.31x

stages.name: Pro Studio EQ, Dynamics & Color
stages.description: Console emulation · tape · bus comp · exciter

logs.m: [EQ] shelf +4 dB @ 60 Hz  |  air +3 dB @ 14 kHz  |  mids +0 dB @ 400 Hz
[DYN] forced -3dB peak ceiling before final stage

stages.name: Loudness Normalization (EBU R128)
stages.description: Integrated LUFS · true-peak · LRA

logs.m: [LIMITER] overshoot 6.3dB exceeds 4dB. Dropping input gain by 2.3dB

stages.name: Encode & Export
stages.description: 6-ch WAV · AC-3 · DTS · metadata embed

logs.m: $ ffmpeg -i master.wav -c:a libmp3lame -b:a 320k -ar 48000 Undegradable Bitch- to publish_youtube.mp3
✓ Undegradable Bitch- to publish_youtube.mp3  320 kbps stereo  (5.8 MB)
$ ffmpeg -i master.wav -c:a pcm_s24le -ar 48000 Undegradable Bitch- to publish_spotify.wav
✓ Undegradable Bitch- to publish_spotify.wav  48kHz 24-bit stereo  (41.4 MB)
$ ffmpeg -i master.wav -c:a flac Undegradable Bitch- to publish_surround_5.1.flac
✓ Undegradable Bitch- to publish_surround_5.1.flac  FLAC 5.1 Lossless  (29.0 MB)

stages.name: Quality Assurance & Evaluation
stages.description: Measure final output LUFS · True-Peak · LRA report

logs.m: evaluating master: Undegradable Bitch- to publish_spotify.wav
$ ffmpeg -i Undegradable Bitch- to publish_spotify.wav -filter_complex ebur128=peak=true -f null -
